Event: Hidden Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 11/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A17


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Challenge
Golden Heart

Triggers: Once in a while

Lucky Toss
The unit throws a coin at a random unit. The coin bounces 3 times at random units. On hit, one of the following effects is triggered based on the target:
- If the coin hits an ally, it removes a random debuff and restores 25% health. The coin has a 50% chance to remove all debuffs from the ally instead and restore 35% health to the target and all allies in a small radius around it.
- If the coin hits an enemy, it removes a random buff and deals magic damage equal to 25% of the target's max health. The coin has a 50% chance to remove all buffs from the enemy instead and deal magic damage equal to 35% of the target's max health to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
